papers.title: Switch: Learning Agile Skills Switching for Humanoid Robots
papers.summary: 提出Switch层次化多技能系统，通过技能图建立技能间运动学相似性关联，结合深度强化学习训练全身跟踪策略与在线调度器，实现人形机器人任意时刻的灵活技能切换。

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus V3 hand and arm details revealed in new patents - Teslarati
Tesla Has Some Robot Competition. The Stock Is Up. - Barron's
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉人形机器人面临竞争，股价反而上涨，表明市场对机器人业务前景仍具信心，行业赛道潜力和商业价值获投资者认可。

companyNews.title: Tesla eyes Shanghai Gigafactory for Optimus humanoid robot mass production - The Next Web
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉拟在上海超级工厂量产Optimus人形机器人，标志着其将生产本土化并加码中国市场布局，有望加速人形机器人商业化落地。

companyNews.title: Has Tesla Found a Solution for Producing Its Optimus Robot at Scale? - TipRanks
Tesla leader believes Shanghai factory operations will play a role in robot mass production - The Washington Post
companyNews.summary: Tesla领导人表示上海工厂将参与人形机器人Optimus的量产，有助于推动特斯拉机器人计划的落地，此举将加速全球人形机器人产业化进程。
